summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating classification per open PR. This inventory shard has no shared canonical, no hydrated duplicate/supersession evidence, no security-sensitive items, and close/low-signal cleanup is not permitted by the job artifact.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent maintainer-review PR; there is no hydrated canonical/duplicate target and the job does not allow low-signal closeout.
Keep open as an independent localization PR awaiting author/maintainer handling; no duplicate or superseding hydrated item is available.
Keep open as an independent focused bug-fix PR; it may be useful, but this plan-mode inventory job cannot merge or repair it and has no duplicate/supersession evidence.
Keep open as an independent cron/session-state PR; one proof check is failing and maintainer cannot modify the branch, but closeout or replacement is not allowed in this job.
Keep open as an independent plugin API feature PR; failed checks and compatibility risk require normal maintainer review, but there is no closure basis in this inventory shard.
